title: Wither Storm Panorama!
description: Adds the Wither Storm to the Panorama!
body:
This is a simple resource pack that adds the **Wither Storm** to the panorama, **similar** to the one in Cracker's Wither Storm Mod!
![Showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/96bb9748e7028abf85f59c5cdc2f654ac2eb2fc1.png)![Image Source : https://minecraft.wiki/w/Story_Mode:Wither_Storm](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9b1ee66d59918fcfaf31f8960cbec21ad138fb99_0.webp)
